footer.tagline: Holistic wellness for your everyday life.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this section.

empty.noResultsDesc: Try different filters or search terms.

sidePanel.quoteLogin: The body is your temple. Keep it pure and clean for the soul to reside in.
sidePanel.quoteRegister: Yoga is the journey of the self, through the self, to the self.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your wellness journey
login.error: Wrong email or password. Please try again.
login.unverifiedEmail: Your email is not verified yet. Please check your inbox.
login.resendSuccess: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
login.resendError: Could not send email. Please try again.

register.title: Begin your journey
register.subtitle: Join the Omzone community and transform your wellbeing
register.terms: By signing up you agree to our terms of use and privacy policy.
register.success: Account created! Please check your email to verify your account.
register.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {{email}}
checkEmail.instructions: Click the link in the email to activate your account. If you can't find it, check your spam folder.

verifyEmail.successSubtitle: Your account is ready. Welcome to Omzone.
verifyEmail.errorLinkExpired: The verification link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
verifyEmail.errorInvalid: The verification link is not valid.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it
forgotPassword.successSubtitle: Check your inbox. The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgotPassword.error: We couldn't find an account with that email.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a secure password for your account
resetPassword.successSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorExpired: The recovery link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorInvalid: The recovery link is not valid.
